---
title: "Writing"
description: "Notes on building ML systems for biology, and the occasional side quest."
pagetitle: "Writing by Jeroen Van Goey"
# Preserve the old /blog.html URL (renamed from blog.qmd) so existing inbound
# links and bookmarks still resolve.
aliases:
  - /blog.html
listing:
  id: post-list
  contents: posts          # any index.qmd under posts/ becomes a post
  type: default            # cards with image, title, description, meta
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true         # category cloud in the sidebar
  sort-ui: [date, title]
  filter-ui: true
  feed: true               # generates writing.xml (RSS) at the site root
  fields: [date, title, description, reading-time, categories]
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

A place for longer-form notes: how I build things in scientific ML, the
reasoning behind design decisions, and the side projects that don't fit on a CV.
